name: @arpagon/pi-web-providers
description_en: Configurable web access extension for pi with per-tool provider routing for search, contents, answers, and research across Claude, Cloudflare, Codex, Custom CLI, Exa, Gemini, Perplexity, Parallel, and Valyu.
description_zh: Pi 的可配置网页访问扩展，每个工具提供者路由用于搜索、内容、答案和研究，跨越 Claude、Cloudflare、Codex、自定义 CLI、Exa、Gemini、Perplexity、Parallel 和 Valyu
